panels.title: TPS — обработано транзакций в секунду
panels.description: Число заскоренных транзакций в секунду по времени (учитывает фильтры по штату и мерчанту).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(scored_at, '1s'), count(*) AS tps FROM transaction_scores WHERE $__timeFilter(scored_at) AND us_state = ANY(string_to_array('${us_state:csv}', ',')) AND merch = ANY(string_to_array('${merch:csv}', ',')) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Плотность распределения скоров (нормированная, фильтры по штату и мерчанту)
panels.description: Доля транзакций в бакетах скора шириной 0.05 (сумма по бакетам = 1) по последним 5000 записям.

targets.rawSql: WITH f AS (SELECT score FROM transaction_scores WHERE us_state = ANY(string_to_array('${us_state:csv}', ',')) AND merch = ANY(string_to_array('${merch:csv}', ',')) ORDER BY scored_at DESC LIMIT 5000) SELECT round((width_bucket(LEAST(score, 0.999), 0, 1, 20) - 1) * 0.05, 2) AS score_bucket, count(*)::float / NULLIF((SELECT count(*) FROM f), 0) AS density FROM f GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Средняя доля фрода по категории cat_id (последние 1000)
panels.description: Средний fraud_flag по каждой категории продукта за последние 1000 транзакций (учитывает фильтры).

targets.rawSql: SELECT cat_id, avg(fraud_flag::float) AS fraud_rate FROM (SELECT cat_id, fraud_flag FROM transaction_scores WHERE us_state = ANY(string_to_array('${us_state:csv}', ',')) AND merch = ANY(string_to_array('${merch:csv}', ',')) ORDER BY scored_at DESC LIMIT 1000) t GROUP BY cat_id ORDER BY fraud_rate DESC

list.name: us_state
list.label: Штат (us_state)
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT us_state FROM transaction_scores WHERE us_state IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT us_state FROM transaction_scores WHERE us_state IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

list.name: merch
list.label: Мерчант (merch)
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT merch FROM transaction_scores WHERE merch IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT merch FROM transaction_scores WHERE merch IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1
